nasb.text: The tree that you saw, which became large and grew strong, whose height reached to the sky and was visible to all the earth

esv.text: The tree you saw, which grew and became strong, so that its top reached to heaven, and it was visible to the end of the whole earth,

cnv.text: 你所見的樹漸長，而且堅強，高達於天，全地的人都看得到。

ccb.text: 你梦见的树苍劲有力，高可参天，从地极都能看见。
